title: He Imploreth Mercy Upon Those Condemned With Fashionable Folly To Marry, And Illustrateth Their Condition.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Horatio Alger, Jr. delivers a powerful performance in "He Imploreth Mercy Upon Those Condemned With Fashionable Folly To Marry, And Illustrateth Their Condition."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
